content: In this lecture, Ian Ball discusses cheap talk, a communication framework between players in which messages do not directly affect the payoffs of the game. Providing and receiving information is free.
title: Lecture 24: Cheap Talk

video_metadata.video_tags: 14-12-economic-applications-of-game-theory-fall-2025, cheap talk, communication, costless messages, game theory, payoffs
video_metadata.youtube_description:
MIT 14.12 Economic Applications of Game Theory, Fall 2025 
Instructor: Ian Ball 
View the complete course: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/14-12-economic-applications-of-game-theory-fall-2025/
YouTube Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLUl4u3cNGP63quuKvMHCt3cmTmt0O2qpv

In this lecture, Ian Ball discusses cheap talk, which is a communication framework between players where messages do not directly affect the payoffs of the game. Providing and receiving information is free.
